svg.aria-label: Cloudflare global outage on November 18 2025 full post-mortem timeline, service impact scope and root cause analysis, Multi-CDN failover strategy and automatic resilience design from an SRE perspective.
svg.title: 2025-11-19: Cloudflare 11-18 global outage post-mortem and resilience plan

g.text: Cloudflare edge plane failure : DNS + WAF +...
Global edge plane fail : DNS + WAF + Workers affected
DNS resolution stalls : WAF rule eval block : Workers...
Major SaaS down : API gateway 5xx : retail...
Cascading 5xx : API gateway timeout : retail checkout...
Status timeline log : RCA depends on stuck deploy :...
DNS health-check failover : Multi-CDN steering : retry...
Route53 health check + secondary CDN : weighted DNS :...
